testsuite.name: turbomq.broker.ExactlyOnceTest

testcase.name: getLastSequence returns the last accepted sequence
duplicate sequence number is rejected as DUPLICATE
sequence going backwards is rejected as DUPLICATE
first write with sequence 0 is accepted
sequence gap is rejected as OUT_OF_ORDER
different producers have independent sequence tracking
expireProducer removes all state for a producer
re-sending last accepted sequence is DUPLICATE
same producer can write independently to different partitions

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:13.225 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.227 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.228 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.228 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 2 08:31:13.228 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 3 08:31:13.229 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.230 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.230 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.230 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 2 08:31:13.231 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Expired producer 1 08:31:13.232 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.232 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.233 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.233 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 2 08:31:13.233 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.233 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Expired producer 1 08:31:13.234 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.234 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 08:31:13.235 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1
